rankings.reason: Best alignment with the futuristic 2050 vision, emphasizing AI, biometrics, and social-media-worthy eco-friendly design.
Strong focus on user experience and specific tech like holograms, though it describes an existing airport experience.
Offers creative logistical solutions, but the focus on bowling alleys feels less innovative than high-tech digital integration.
Worst option as it describes standard, current-day airport procedures rather than a futuristic 2050 vision.
